summary: Soundboard tape praised for its excellent capture, though reviewers give no detail on the musical performance.
review: One reviewer gushes over the Healy tapes, giving the recording a perfect five‑star rating and expressing enthusiasm for having a copy. Another reviewer flags an error about the Steve Miller Band opening, but offers no insight into the music or sound quality. No specific songs or band member performances are mentioned.

ai_rating.rationale: Positive feedback on the tape’s existence and presumed soundboard source offsets a single negative, non‑musical comment; limited detail keeps confidence at medium.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No complaints about clarity or mix; praised as a valuable tape capture.
